title: Prism Hematite Rice Chain Bracelet - Multicolour Crystal Bracelet
short_description: A bold multicolour crystal bracelet with five polished Prism Hematite beads and rainbow-tone geometric rice links, finished with a secure gold-tone lobster clasp and adjustable extension chain.
body_html:
Make every look stand out with the Prism Hematite Rice Chain Bracelet - a bold fusion of vibrant colour, contemporary design and meaningful crystal energy.

The bracelet features five glossy Prism Hematite beads arranged at the centre. Each bead reflects shifting tones of purple, blue, green and gold, creating an eye-catching multicolour finish. The beads are paired with matching geometric rice-shaped links, giving the entire bracelet a sleek and coordinated appearance.

Hematite is traditionally associated with grounding, focus, emotional balance, stability and inner strength. Studd Muffyn's existing Hematite collection positions the crystal around mental clarity, discipline and a steady mindset, making this bracelet suitable for work, travel, meetings and everyday wear.

The adjustable extension chain allows a flexible fit, while the gold-tone lobster clasp provides a secure closure. Its colourful metallic finish makes it easy to wear as a standalone statement piece or layer with other minimal bracelets.

Key Features

  • Five polished Prism Hematite beads
  • Multicolour purple, blue, green and gold reflections
  • Matching rainbow-tone geometric rice links
  • Adjustable extension chain
  • Secure gold-tone lobster clasp
  • Lightweight and comfortable construction
  • Ideal for everyday and occasion styling

Hematite, Traditionally Associated With

  • Grounding and stability
  • A focused and disciplined mindset
  • Mental clarity and concentration
  • Emotional balance
  • Inner strength and confidence
  • Feeling centred during demanding situations

Care

Keep the bracelet away from water, perfume, sweat, lotions and harsh chemicals. Wipe it gently with a soft, dry cloth after use and store it separately in a jewellery pouch or box. Avoid scratching the metallic surface against rough objects to preserve its prism finish.

Crystal benefits are based on traditional beliefs and mindful intention. They are not medical claims or guaranteed outcomes.
seo_title: Prism Hematite Rice Chain Bracelet | Studd Muffyn
seo_description: Bold multicolour Prism Hematite crystal bracelet with rainbow rice-link chain, gold-tone lobster clasp and adjustable fit. Grounding style for everyday wear.

metafields.highlights: Five polished Prism Hematite beads with shifting purple, blue, green and gold reflections. Matching rainbow-tone geometric rice-link chain. Secure gold-tone lobster clasp with adjustable extension chain. Lightweight, comfortable and easy to layer or wear solo.
metafields.material_or_ingredients: Prism Hematite beads (round, polished multicolour metallic finish), geometric rice-link chain in prism/rainbow tone, gold-tone lobster clasp and adjustable extension chain. Country of Origin: India.
metafields.care_or_directions: Keep away from water, perfume, sweat, lotions and harsh chemicals. Wipe gently with a soft, dry cloth after use and store separately in a jewellery pouch or box. Avoid scratching the metallic surface to preserve the prism finish.
metafields.shipping: Ships in 24 hrs · COD available · Free shipping over ₹499

faqs.q: What crystal is used in this bracelet?
faqs.a: It features five polished Prism Hematite beads. Hematite is traditionally associated with grounding, focus, emotional balance and inner strength.

faqs.q: Will this bracelet fit my wrist?
faqs.a: Yes. The adjustable extension chain lets you tighten or loosen the fit, so it comfortably suits most wrist sizes.
No. To protect the prism finish, keep it away from water, sweat, perfume and lotions, and wipe it with a soft dry cloth after wear.

faqs.q: Can it be worn every day?
faqs.a: Absolutely. It is lightweight and comfortable, making it ideal for daily wear, office styling, travel and occasions.
Crystal benefits are based on traditional beliefs and mindful intention. They are not medical claims or guaranteed outcomes.
